description: Embrace the timeless charm of knee-high socks with these vibrant red pairs. Crafted from soft, stretchy fabric, they feature an adorable bow detail at the top that adds a touch of whimsy. These socks are perfect for keeping your little one's legs warm and cosy while injecting a playful pop of colour into their outfit. The knee-high length ensures they stay in place, providing comfort and style. Whether worn with skirts, dresses or leggings, these socks are a versatile accessory that can elevate any ensemble. Available in a pack of three, they offer excellent value and convenience. Sized to fit most girls, these knee-highs are a must-have addition to any young fashionista's wardrobe.
